title: lotus pedunculatus var. glabriusculus
intro: Lotus pedunculatus var. glabriusculus, also known as Lotus glabriusculus, is a water-loving perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its delicate pink or white flowers and distinctive leaf structure. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Consuming or using the plant in herbal preparations is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lotus glabriusculus are typically made from its roots, leaves, or flowers and can be found in forms such as teas, infusions, or dried extracts.
